---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for DialogFlow AI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Motivation

**What problem does this solve?**
Why is this feature needed? What pain point does it address?

**Use Case:**
Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your vision for how this feature should work.

**User Interface:**
How would users interact with this feature?

**User Experience:**
What should the user experience look like?

## Examples (Optional)

If you've seen this feature implemented elsewhere, please share:
- Links to similar features in other projects
- Screenshots or mockups
- Reference implementations

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why do you prefer your proposal?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

![Mockup description](https://via.placeholder.com/400x300?text=Mockup)

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - blocker for my use case
- [ ] High - would greatly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement

## Willing to Contribute

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this feature
- [ ] No, I don't have time but I can help with testing/reviews
- [ ] No, I'm only requesting

---

**Thank you for your suggestion! 💡**
